sys_script_include.description:
2.7 STRY0100724 - DEV Story- Performance Improvements - Running Templates - This is a new script include that replaces the workflow. It also udpates the template instance status to track completion STRY0105125 - DIA - Draft Scheduled Tasks - Banner Notification STRY0110317 - DIA: Time in Task suspense date defaults to the time when creating the Templates. Adjust the default time to the end of the day for all new Templates. DFCT0010609 - "Suspense Date" on tasks created from "Templates" adds 1 hour
This script include takes a Template and builds the associated Task Tree
sys_script_include.name: Tasker_GenerateTaskFromTemplate
